Music YoYo Sitar — Solo Afro-Desi Raga Voice Sound Journey About Contact Press Kit

Afro-Desi

A high-energy live set blending sitar, African string instruments, and rhythm — built for festivals and dance-driven stages.

A dynamic meeting of African strings (kora / goni traditions) and Indian raga, carried by live improvisation, shared rhythm, and deep groove — hypnotic, emotional, and relentlessly alive.

What it is

  • A groove-forward concert where melodic improvisation rides on rhythmic interplay
  • Flexible energy: can lean trance-like and hypnotic or bright and dance-driven, depending on the stage

Formats

  • Duo (African strings + sitar)
  • Trio (with percussion / tabla)
  • Festival ensemble (expanded, on request)

Best for

Festivals · World music stages · Cultural events · Dance-friendly concert nights

Duration

45 / 60 / 75 minutes (flexible)

Technical

2–4 line inputs (depending on format). Stage plot + tech rider available on request.

Check availability / Book

﻿
